mapper.insert:
insert into tbl_calendar_maintance (calendar_year, calendar_date, day_type, create_id, create_time, deleted) values
(#{item.calendarYear}, #{item.calendarDate}, #{item.dayType}, #{item.createId}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.deleted})
mapper.select: SELECT cm.calendar_date AS calendarDate, cm.day_type AS dayType FROM tbl_calendar_maintance cm WHERE cm.calendar_date BETWEEN #{startTime} AND #{endTime} ORDER BY cm.calendar_date ASC
